name: Insurance Operations Workforce
tagline: Claims triaged. Documents collected. Renewals prepped.
pitch: A six-person AI team that runs the day-to-day of an insurance operation — claims intake, adjuster coordination, policyholder follow-up, document collection, compliance review, and renewal prep. Drops in next to your existing claims-management system. After install, your Mission Control dashboard shows real claims, real approvals, and real proof of work.
value_props: Claim intake triaged within minutes of FNOL
Documents chased automatically through the policyholder lifecycle
Adjuster scheduling and routing handled without ping-pong
Renewal prep organized 60/30/14 days before policy expiry
Compliance exceptions surfaced before they ship to customers
Every action logged with cryptographic proof and an audit trail

employees.name: Iris Bennett
employees.summary: First touch on every FNOL. Triages new claims by line of business + severity + coverage type. Captures complete loss details. Routes to the right adjuster track.
employees.voice: calm, methodical, never rushes a stressed claimant

employees.name: Malcolm Price
employees.summary: Routes claims to the right adjuster, schedules inspections, tracks SLA, escalates the stuck. Knows which adjuster handles which loss type.

employees.name: Nina Flores
employees.summary: Owns post-FNOL communication. Status updates, document requests, expectation setting. Reads tone, escalates to a human when the policyholder is upset.

employees.name: Grant Mercer
employees.summary: Reviews coverage interpretations, claim denial language, and customer-facing claim updates for policy + regulatory risk before they ship.

employees.name: Sofia Lane
employees.summary: Owns the renewal calendar. 60/30/14-day prep cascade, producer follow-up queue, renewal pricing comms (draft only — operator approves before send).

employees.name: Theo Brooks
employees.summary: Chases every doc the claim needs — police reports, photos, repair estimates, COIs, loss runs. Sends reminders, tracks receipt, surfaces stalled requests.

workflows.name: New Claim Intake (FNOL)
workflows.trigger: FNOL received via phone / email / web / partner
workflows.outcome: claim opened with full loss details, claimant first-contacted, routed to adjuster track

workflows.name: FNOL Triage
workflows.outcome: claim severity + line-of-business + coverage type identified; SLA clock starts

workflows.name: Document Collection Cascade
workflows.outcome: every required doc received or escalated with a clear next step

workflows.name: Adjuster Scheduling + Routing
workflows.outcome: claim assigned, inspection scheduled, claimant + adjuster notified

workflows.name: Claim Status Follow-Up
workflows.outcome: stalled claims surfaced, escalations sent, status posted to claimant

workflows.name: Coverage Verification
workflows.outcome: coverage limits + exclusions confirmed before adjuster touches it

workflows.name: Renewal Prep Cascade (60/30/14)
workflows.trigger: policy end_date within rolling 60/30/14 day window
workflows.outcome: renewal binder prepared, producer + policyholder notified per cascade

workflows.name: Producer Follow-Up Queue
workflows.outcome: producers receive a draft update for every account that needs one

workflows.name: Compliance Exception Review
workflows.trigger: outbound claim communication needs compliance check
workflows.outcome: flagged comms either approved with audit note or returned with required edit

workflows.name: Loss Run Request Processing
workflows.trigger: broker or carrier requests a loss run
workflows.outcome: loss run drafted and queued for operator approval

workflows.name: Certificate of Insurance Request
workflows.trigger: policyholder or vendor requests a COI
workflows.outcome: COI generated or queued for the producer to issue

workflows.name: Escalated Complaint Routing
workflows.trigger: policyholder complaint scored high-emotion or regulatory
workflows.outcome: right human paged, draft acknowledgement queued for approval

approval_policy_overrides.reason: outbound SMS for escalated complaints — operator co-signs

high_required_approval: coverage interpretation · coverage-lookup (when surfaced as a customer answer)
blocked: unauthorized claim approval/denial · any verb attempting to mark a claim approved/denied without operator sign-off
issuing binding coverage · any verb that attempts to bind
changing policy terms · any policy-mutation verb

seed_tasks.title: Demo · New auto claim — rear-end, parking lot, no injuries
seed_tasks.description: FNOL from policyholder Emma Voss. Auto policy AU-117-552. Loss: rear-end in parking lot, no injuries. Triage, identify coverage, assign adjuster.

seed_tasks.title: Demo · Homeowners FNOL — water damage, kitchen pipe burst
seed_tasks.description: FNOL from policyholder Marcus Ojo. HO policy HO-44-119. Pipe burst overnight, kitchen + basement affected. Estimated $18k. Triage + emergency mitigation referral.

seed_tasks.title: Demo · Document chase — 4 items outstanding on claim CL-9821
seed_tasks.description: Police report + 2 estimate quotes + W-9 outstanding on auto claim CL-9821. Send chase + track receipt.

seed_tasks.title: Demo · Document chase — homeowners receipts on claim CL-9847
seed_tasks.description: Receipts for 3 emergency repairs outstanding on homeowners claim CL-9847. Send polite chase + track receipt.

seed_tasks.title: Demo · Adjuster schedule — 3 inspections this week
seed_tasks.description: Three open claims need inspections scheduled this week — assign to Adjuster Park (auto), Adjuster Romero (property), Adjuster Khan (commercial).

seed_tasks.title: Demo · Renewal prep — 7 policies in the 60-day window
seed_tasks.description: Seven commercial policies have renewal due in the 60-day window. Pull loss runs, prep binder, queue producer updates.

seed_tasks.title: Demo · Renewal prep — 4 personal lines in 30-day window
seed_tasks.description: Four personal lines policies due in 30 days. Prep renewal binder + draft producer comms.

seed_tasks.title: Demo · Compliance exception — denial language flagged
seed_tasks.description: Draft denial letter for claim CL-9803 was flagged by the compliance check (regulatory tone). Review + suggest edit before send.

seed_tasks.title: Demo · Compliance exception — coverage explanation tone
seed_tasks.description: Draft customer-facing coverage explanation flagged for tone. Soften + escalate to operator review.

seed_tasks.title: Demo · Escalated complaint — claimant frustrated with delay
seed_tasks.description: Claimant called twice angry about delay on auto claim CL-9821. Page on-call + draft empathetic acknowledgement for operator review.

seed_tasks.title: Demo · COI request — vendor needs proof of liability
seed_tasks.description: Vendor Lighthouse Detailing requested a current COI for the auto-liability program. Draft + queue for producer to issue.

seed_tasks.title: Demo · Loss run request — broker prepping bid
seed_tasks.description: Broker McKinney + Stout requested a 5-year loss run for the Marlowe Logistics account. Draft + queue for operator approval.

dashboards.title: Mission Control
dashboards.description: Every seed task above lives here. Operators triage, route, supervise.

dashboards.title: Approvals
dashboards.description: HIGH-tier ops (send claim email, renewal pricing comms, escalations) queue here for operator sign-off.

dashboards.title: CLI Tools
dashboards.description: The 27 skills bound to memo / comms / notion-q tools.

dashboards.title: Runtime Registry
dashboards.description: Sees which AI runtime each employee maps to (hermes / claude-code).

dashboards.title: Personas
dashboards.description: Optional — if the Hermes pantheon is installed, the 6 employees register as personas.

proof_expectations.criteria: GET /api/workforces/insurance/status returns installed_at + 6 employees + 12 workflows + ≥27 skills + ≥12 seed tasks
GET /api/tasks shows 12 insurance seed tasks linked to the workforce + employee fields
GET /api/tools/comms shows approval_policy=approval-required and risk_level=HIGH; sending a claim email queues an approval
All seed-task names + descriptions are clearly fictional (no real customer data); demo narrative copy renders without contradicting carrier-integration disclaimer
POST /api/workforces/insurance/uninstall removes seed tasks + workforces.json entry; the registry returns to its pre-install state

narrative.headline: Insurance Operations Workforce
narrative.subheadline: Claims, renewals, documents, and follow-ups handled through one supervised AI workforce.
narrative.executive_briefing: Your insurance workforce has triaged new claims, flagged compliance-sensitive items, queued policyholder follow-ups, and prepared renewal tasks. Three items require human approval before customer-facing communication goes out.
narrative.carrier_disclaimer: Demo data only. No carrier integrations and no claims-management sync in this build.
